ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset class */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment methodology */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the fund */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the fund (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "target_return" TEXT /* Target return rate for the fund */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Expected duration of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of investment in the fund */,
  "committed_amount" TEXT /* Amount committed to the fund */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fund was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fund was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_asset_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund that made the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "amount_invested" TEXT /* Amount invested */,
  "amount_received" TEXT /* Amount received */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the investment */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the investment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Expected duration of the investment */,
  "return_rate" TEXT /* Expected return rate for the investment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the investment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the investment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "remaining_value" TEXT /* Remaining value of the fund */,
  "percentage_return" TEXT /* Percentage return of the fund */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the methodology used for performance calculation */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., IRR, TWR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "asset_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "asset_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the asset class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the asset class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology (e.g., IRR, TWR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the methodology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the methodology was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the methodology was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investment manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
